headline: Apply to the SDOH ART Fellowship
intro: Complete the application below. You can review and edit every field before submitting, attach your CV and a headshot, and download a PDF copy of your completed application for your records.
eligibility: Open to early-career and mid-career nurse scientists and interdisciplinary doctoral students, postdoctoral fellows, and faculty whose research engages the social determinants of health. (Final eligibility language to be confirmed.)

fields.name: researchArea
fields.label: Research area / SDOH topic of interest

fields.name: statement
fields.label: Statement of research interest
fields.help: Briefly describe your research and how the fellowship fits your goals.

fields.name: references
fields.label: Reference letters or referee contacts
fields.help: List referees with email, or note that letters will be sent separately. Applications without references are considered incomplete.

fields.name: hearAbout
fields.label: How did you hear about the program?

fields.name: consent
fields.label: I confirm the information provided is accurate.
